name: Mechouia-Style Lamb Leg with Cumin Dipping Salt

ingredients.item:
2.5kg (5lb 8oz) leg of lamb on the bone
50g (1¾oz) butter, softened
2 tbsp ground coriander
1 tbsp ground cumin
1 tbsp cumin seeds
2 tsp paprika
1 tsp cayenne pepper
1 tsp dried thyme
4 garlic cloves, crushed and peeled
1 tbsp crushed sea salt
freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original:

1 tsp dried thyme

1 tbsp crushed sea salt
freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.item:
2 tbsp cumin seeds
2 tbsp crushed sea salt
pinch of ground cinnamon
ingredients.original:
2 tbsp cumin seeds
2 tbsp crushed sea salt
